steps.title: Identify the specific advantage to explain
steps.content: The task asks the student to explain an advantage of Oak Tree House. The notes document one specific advantage: the overhanging rock protected it from heavy rain and snow. This is the key signal—any effective response must explain this concrete advantage.

steps.title: Match the advantage to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly explains the specific advantage from the notes—the rock overhang protected Oak Tree House from heavy rain and snow. The other three either vaguely reference an advantage, omit advantages entirely, or incorrectly apply information about a different site. That matches choice D — D is correct.
